# Copilot Instructions

<!--
  This file provides repository-level instructions for GitHub Copilot.
  Copilot will follow these instructions for every conversation in this repository.

  Guidelines for writing instructions:
  - Be concise and specific.
  - Prefer positive statements ("use X") over negative ones ("don't use Y").
  - Group related instructions together with a heading.
  - Remove this comment block and replace the sample content below with your real instructions.
-->

## General

- This repository stores personal GitHub Copilot customizations.
- When creating new prompts or instructions, follow the templates in `prompts/` and `instructions/`.

## Style

- Use clear, imperative language in prompts (e.g., "Generate …", "Refactor …").
- Keep each prompt focused on a single task.
